title: 1080p L4J KBM Icons
description: The Legacy4J keyboard and mouse icons redrawn for 1080p
body:
### The assets in this resource pack have been implemented in base Legacy4J. Therefore, this pack has been discontinued.

# About
This resource pack replaces the 720p optimized keyboard and mouse icons in the Legacy4J mod with ones redrawn for 1080p.


<details>
<summary>Disclaimer</summary>

This resource pack requires the [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) mod and its dependencies.

</details>


## Comparison
L4J Default:
![The keyboard and mouse icons as seen in Legacy4J by default](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c287be76c36bf7b82735076806384dbf3a67f39.png)
1080p KBM Icons:
![The keyboard and mouse icons as seen with the 1080p KBM Icon resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4a28fa9279d8dd532320a2cd1a9d39bb0c9d901.png)
